prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-SPACEROCKET-17INCH Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 2 in 1 Space Rocket Astronaut Toys with Lights and Sounds, 17 Inches (Ages 3 and Up) Description: Blast off into new heights of intergalactic playtime with this awesome 2 in 1 space rocket from Kidplokio!

This space rocket converts between space rocket and space station (some assembly required), so kids can have double the fun! Encouraging imagination and creativity, this fun space toy also promotes the development of hand eye coordination and fine motor skills, tactile sensory stimulation, and may even spark an interest in space, science or astronomy or other related fields! And, importantly, the space rocket encourages kids to actively participate in screen free playtime, whether for solo missions, or outer galaxy adventures with friends and family.

Kids will love the 2 in 1 playtime option for all their interstellar explorations, and with entertaining lights and sounds, this space rocket just got a whole lot more fun! Including launching, rumbling and intercom sound effects, as well as a light up astronaut figurine, little astronauts will love commanding their very own space station! Easily portable, the space rocket can be toted for travel or playdates with the built in exterior handle, while all accessories remain locked safely inside.

Built to withstand even the most thrilling galactic adventures, this space themed rocket and accessories are safe and durable enough for active playtime sessions; designed with little hands in mind, this space toys playset is suitable for children ages three and up. Search Terms: space shuttle spaceship toy gifts for 3 year old boys stem toddler tactile sensory fine motor skills astronaut birthday presents stocking stuffers pretend play rocket ship toy screen free activities for toddlers space toys kids Features: - ASTRONAUT TOYS PLAYSET: Blast off to new heights of interstellar playtime with this awesome 2 in 1 rocket that converts to a space station! Great for both fun playtime and developmental growth, little astronauts will love this hands-on space rocket toy playset for all their outer galaxy adventures - LIGHTS & SOUNDS: To make playtime even more fun and exciting, this 2 in 1 space rocket kids toy comes with launching, rumbling and intercom sound effects, as well as a light up astronaut figurine; Kids will love commanding their very own space station! - PORTABLE SPACE TOYS: Converting from awesome space rocket to space station, kids will love the 2 in 1 playing options! Easily portable, the space rocket can be toted for travel or playdates with the built in exterior handle, while all accessories remain locked safely inside - TACTILE TOYS: Launch their imagination to new intergalactic levels with this hands-on space toys playset; sparking curiosity about space, astronomy and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination and encourages them to participate in screen free playtime with friends or family - DURABLE AND SAFE: Built to withstand even the most thrilling galactic adventures, this space themed rocket and accessories are safe and durable enough for active playtime sessions; designed with little hands in mind, this space toys playset is suitable for children ages three and up === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 17in 2 in 1 Space Rocket Astronaut Toy

anthropic.title_differentiation: Converts To Space Station, Lights And Sounds, Light Up Astronaut, Portable Handle, Ages 3 Plus, Screen Free Play

openai.title_differentiation: Converts To Space Station, Lights And Sounds, Portable Handle, Light Up Astronaut, Ages 3 And Up
